creator: Rainer.Hurling@rhurlin.de
text:
Thanks for the response.

Yes, I have installed ncurses from ports and I need it for several other
ports.

In the PR's description I also mentioned the error with
/usr/local/lib/libtinfo.so.5.9. Therefore I suggested to patch libcdio's
Makefile with

LDFLAGS+= -ltinfow

With this it finds the needed version of libtinfo. This patch completely
solves the problem for 10.0 and HEAD and it should also work with
FreeBSD versions < 10.0.

Other ports did it before also, e.g. mail/mutt or editors/emacs. Are
there any objections against the suggested patch?
